title: Soul Refining Tribe
content:
Soul Refining Tribe
 is one of the behemoths of 
East Demon Spirit Sea
. After the tribe took over the territory of the 
Fire Demon Country
, Wang Lin renamed it the Soul Refining Sect.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

3

Spells

3.1

Main-Cultivation Techniques

3.2

Forbidden Spells

Background
[
]

In the past, 
Huang Long
 helped people of the village in 
The Valley
. He set up formations so that the wild demon spirits would not be able to enter the territory of the village.

History
[
]

The Valley was the first sign of civilization 
Wang Lin
 saw after he entered the East Demon Spirit Sea. After he bested 
Ouyang Hua
, he was invited inside by the latter. He gave some spirit pills in exchange for absorbing the sliver of demon spirit energy inside the village. Later, he saved the village from the attack of another cultivator and established the Soul Refining Tribe.

Wang Lin then ordered the tribe members to attack all the small villages in the vicinity and absorb their members. The tribe members make the defeated people drink a memory-wiping drink and then assimilate them into their own tribe. Through this process, Soul Refining Tribe became the strongest power in the 
Sky Demon Country
's lands outside of the Sky Demon Country itself.

After returning from the Sky Demon Country's capital, Wang Lin ordered the tribe members to enter the Ancient Battlefield and absorb the resentful souls from there. Then he ordered them to participate in the war between the Sky Demon Country and the Fire Demon Country.

After a few centuries when Wang Lin returned to the East Demon Spirit Sea, he found that the tribe controls the land of what was formerly the Fire Demon Country and stands on equal standing with the other eight countries.

Spells
[
]

[
]

Soul Refining

Soul Extracting

Soul Sealing

Forbidden Spells
[
]

Nine Cycle Celestial Refining Tactic

Eight incomplete low-quality Celestial Spells (split from four complete low-quality Celestial Spells)
